_comment: Skill Smith runtime configuration. Every field is overridable by an environment variable (see README / backend/src/config/config.ts). Edit values here for persistent defaults.
_model: Engine model passed to `claude -p --model`. Default is the strongest coding model. Env override: SKILL_SMITH_MODEL. Set to "" to use the CLI's own default model.
_bare: Pass --bare to the claude CLI (skips local hooks/skills/MCP/CLAUDE.md for deterministic CI runs). Bare mode needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Env: SKILL_SMITH_BARE.
_claudeBin: Path/name of the Claude Code CLI binary. Tests point this at a mock. Env: SKILL_SMITH_CLAUDE_BIN.
_workspaceDir: Where per-job artifacts are written (workspace/<jobId>/). Env: SKILL_SMITH_WORKSPACE_DIR.
_maxParallelism: Max concurrent `claude -p` invocations across all jobs (cost/rate guardrail). Env: SKILL_SMITH_MAX_PARALLELISM.
_perJobInvocationCeiling: Hard cap on claude invocations per job; the pipeline stops gracefully when hit. Env: SKILL_SMITH_INVOCATION_CEILING.
_retry: Retry-with-backoff for retryable claude failures (rate_limit/overloaded/server_error/connection). Env: SKILL_SMITH_RETRY_MAX, SKILL_SMITH_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_MS, SKILL_SMITH_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_MS.
_toolPermissions: Per-stage --allowed-tools. Only the research stage may use the web. Stages not listed get no tools.
